Liverpool have ended their pursuit of RB Leipzig midfielder Naby Keita, according to Sky sources.

Sky Sports News understands the Reds decided to end their interest when their second, and final, bid was rejected by the Bundesliga club two weeks ago.

It is also understood Liverpool would renew their interest should Leipzig change their stance, but so far there has been no indication that will be the case. A senior official at Leipzig told Sky Sports News last week that Keita will "100 per cent not be sold in this window" having revealed the club had already rejected a £67m offer from an unnamed side.

The 22-year-old caused a Leipzig training session to be abandoned earlier this week after his "brutal foul" left team-mate Diego Demme needing to go to hospital for treatment. Keita, who scored eight goals in 31 appearances last season, was later pictured making amends with Demme.

新加盟利物浦的安德魯羅拔臣表示，希望入隊後能交出自己的最佳表現，目標是要在紅軍取得一席常規正選位置。
過去3季在侯城表現出色的安德魯羅拔臣（Andrew Robertson），早前升呢轉會利物浦，據報轉會費為1000萬鎊，他在加盟紅軍後已為自己訂下了明確目標，就是立志要成為利物浦的必然正選。
23歲的羅拔臣對英國《電訊報》說：「我來這裡就是要成為首選，明顯地，這取決於領隊，這兒位置的競爭將會很大，但這裡亦是我期望晉身頂級水平的一個地方，我很尊重其他球員，知道他們皆可做好工作，我必須交出最佳表現，希望這足以令我成為首選。」
利物浦周六將會友賽德甲哈化柏林，羅拔臣坦言希望正選落場：「如果我不是正選陣容一分子的話，我會不高興，我不喜歡坐在後備席，儘管即使在侯城踢盃賽時也非常罕見，我不是一個好的觀眾，對我而言，受傷或無緣比賽都是噩夢。」
